# ⚠️ DEPRECATED — DO NOT EDIT ⚠️

**This is the OLD native SwiftUI Sven app. It is NOT in use.**

The active Sven app is the **Expo/React Native** app at:

```
~/dispatch/apps/dispatch-app/
```

This folder exists only as a historical reference. Do not:
- Edit any files here
- Build or deploy from here
- Reference this code for bug fixes

**If you need to work on the Sven iOS app, go to `~/dispatch/apps/dispatch-app/`.**
